name: Vietnamese Village Hut (Damaged)
prompt:
Damaged/destroyed Vietnamese village hut. War-torn version of the stilted house - partially burned, collapsed.

Physical structure:
- Stilts: 4-6 posts, 2 broken/angled (snapped)
  - Remaining stilts charred/blackened
- Floor: tilted/collapsed platform, partially intact
  - One corner dropped where stilt broke
  - Some planks missing (gaps)
- Walls: mostly destroyed
  - One wall partially standing, others reduced to bamboo frame fragments
  - Scattered debris (small box shapes) on ground
- Roof: partially collapsed thatch
  - Half of roof fallen, resting on tilted floor
  - Remaining thatch charred/darkened
  - Exposed roof frame (bamboo poles visible)
- Ground: scattered debris, ash/char marks

Colors: Charred wood (0x2a2015), ash (0x555050), remaining thatch (0x7a6830), darkened bamboo (0x5a4a30), debris (0x4a3a25)
Orientation: Center at origin, damage visible from all angles
Scale: Same as intact hut (~4m x 3m footprint)
